external_store: ambient air as reaction mass and oxidizer
governing_number_or_relation: thrust = mass_flow * delta_v; lift and drag scale with rho * v^2
failure_mode: caps at air-breathing speed and needs atmosphere
notes: Use the local medium while it is abundant; not an orbital solution by itself.

external_store: ambient air as reaction mass and oxidizer
governing_number_or_relation: Mach regime; inlet compression; combustion residence time
failure_mode: mode transition, heating, inlet unstart, thinning air
notes: Useful chord while air still exists; hands off before the air becomes too thin.

discard: none from balloon; rocket exhaust after ignition
governing_number_or_relation: buoyancy buys altitude; rocket still buys velocity
failure_mode: saves drag/max-Q but not orbital velocity
notes: Altitude assist only; useful as setup, not as primary launch physics.

external_store: ground electrical grid or stored energy
discard: projectile heat, ablated material, optional kick-stage exhaust
governing_number_or_relation: kinetic energy = 0.5 * m * v^2; ballistic coefficient = m / (Cd * A)
failure_mode: air wall, heating, g-load, required circularization burn
notes: Best for g-tolerant cargo such as water or metal, not people.

external_store: initial launch energy and atmospheric steering
discard: aero heating and shock energy dumped to air
governing_number_or_relation: Mach number, ballistic coefficient, center-of-mass ahead of center-of-pressure
notes: Fixed shape can use air for limited steering before air thins out.

external_store: relative kinetic energy of incoming payload and tether system
governing_number_or_relation: momentum exchange; catch impulse = delta_p / delta_t
failure_mode: alignment error, shock load, spin mismatch
notes: Soft capture widens the window but does not remove precision guidance.

external_store: planetary magnetic field plus solar/reactor electricity
discard: no onboard mass discard; orbital energy exchanged with planet
governing_number_or_relation: EMF = (v x B) * L; Lorentz force = I * L x B
failure_mode: needs long open conductor, plasma contactors, field geometry
notes: Propellantless orbit raise/deorbit where a planetary field exists.

external_store: orbital momentum of tether and counterweights
discard: counterweight loses altitude or tether needs reboost
governing_number_or_relation: conservation of momentum and angular momentum
failure_mode: rendezvous precision, tether strength, reboost budget
notes: Fleet-scale momentum bank; not free, but can trade down-mass for up-mass.

discard: heat dumped to atmosphere and heat shield
governing_number_or_relation: drag scales with rho * v^2; heat flux scales strongly with velocity
failure_mode: thermal protection, navigation corridor too narrow
notes: Uses atmosphere as external sink instead of spending propellant.

governing_number_or_relation: collection mass flow vs drag; ion exhaust velocity
failure_mode: drag exceeds thrust, intake inefficiency, erosion
notes: Works only in a narrow shell if power and intake close.

failure_mode: low thrust, still spends propellant, shadowing
notes: Free energy source but not free momentum; must throw mass.

governing_number_or_relation: solar radiation pressure about 9 micro-newtons per square meter at 1 AU
failure_mode: very low thrust, area/mass ratio, poor authority far from Sun
notes: External momentum source; slow but tankless.

governing_number_or_relation: specific impulse from exhaust velocity 20-50 km/s; P = 0.5 * mass_flow * u^2
failure_mode: power-limited thrust, radiator mass, propellant still finite
notes: Good mass economy; slow continuous burn.

governing_number_or_relation: Isp roughly 300-450 s; exhaust velocity roughly 3-4.5 km/s
notes: Use when impulse is needed now.

discard: propellant from depot through user vehicle
governing_number_or_relation: mass delivered to depot dominates economics
failure_mode: depot boiloff/leakage, fill cost, traffic not high enough
notes: Strong if many trips amortize setup.

external_store: stored orbital momentum of expendable unit
discard: discarded unit deorbits or changes orbit
notes: Valid discrete reaction mass; passive release does nothing.

governing_number_or_relation: patched conics; delta_v from encounter geometry
failure_mode: requires geometry and timing, no arbitrary direction
notes: Borrow momentum from a large external body.

external_store: remote power station and photon momentum
discard: nothing onboard for sail; waste heat at beam source
governing_number_or_relation: beam divergence, sail lightness number, pointing error
failure_mode: requires infrastructure and line of sight
notes: Moves fuel/power burden off vehicle but not out of the ledger.

external_store: surface tension, magnetic confinement, pressure routing
discard: drag-out film and evaporated trace fluid
governing_number_or_relation: capillary number, Weber number, vapor pressure, magnetic pressure
failure_mode: contamination, droplet shedding, confinement at scale
notes: Airlock-like interface minimizing gas loss; not propulsion but part of logistics.
